languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

languages.text: "Да тут никому не нравится, не только твоей собаке. Холодно, промозгло... Не помешало бы смазать свои протоколы стаканом амасека".
"Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."
languages.original_text: "Да тут никому не нравится, не только твоей собаке. Холодно, промозгло... Не помешало бы смазать свои протоколы стаканом амасека".

traits.locale_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."
"Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."
"Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

languages.text: 「ここ、誰も好きじゃないよ。君の犬だけじゃない。寒いし、濡れてるし…私、アマセックを一杯飲んだら、自分のルールも潤滑油を塗るわ」
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: 「ここ、誰も好きじゃないよ。君のお犬様だけじゃない。寒いし、濡れてるし…私、アマセックを一杯飲んだら、自分のルールも潤滑油を塗るわ。」

languages.text: « Il n'y a pas que votre chien qui se sent mal ici. Il fait froid et humide... Je n'aurais rien contre un bon verre d'amasec pour lubrifier mes propres protocoles. »
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a pas que votre chien qui se sent mal ici. Il fait froid et humide... Je n'aurais rien contre un bon verre d'amasec pour lubrifier mes propres protocoles. »

languages.text: "Euer Hund ist nicht der Einzige, dem es hier nicht gefällt. Die Kälte, die Nässe ... Ich hätte nichts dagegen, meine eigenen Protokolle mit einem Glas Amasec zu ölen."
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Hund ist nicht der Einzige, dem es hier nicht gefällt. Die Kälte, die Nässe ... Ich hätte nichts dagegen, meine eigenen Protokolle mit einem Glas Amasec zu ölen."

languages.text: "Sadece köpeğin değil, kimse burayı sevmedi. Soğuk, ıslak... Kendi protokollerimi bir kadeh amasek ile yağlamaya hayır demezdim."
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: "Sadece köpeğin değil, kimse burayı sevmedi. Soğuk, ıslak... Kendi protokollerimi bir kadeh amasek ile yağlamaya hayır demezdim."

languages.text: «Su perro no es el único que está a disgusto aquí. Tenemos frío, estamos mojados... Ya me gustaría a mí lubricar mis propios protocolos con un buen copazo de amasec».
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: «Su perro no es el único que está a disgusto aquí. Tenemos frío, estamos mojados... Ya me gustaría a mí lubricar mis propios protocolos con un buen copazo de amasec».

languages.text: “没人喜欢这儿，不光是你的狗。又冷又潮湿……要是能来杯艾玛赛克酒，润润我自己的‘协议’，那可再好不过了。”
languages.original_text: "Nobody likes it here, not just your dog. It's cold, it's wet... I wouldn't say no to lubricating my own protocols with a glass of amasec."

traits.locale_text: “没人喜欢这儿，不光是你的狗。又冷又潮湿……要是能来杯艾玛赛克酒，润润我自己的‘协议’，那可再好不过了。”
